ModMetaData.name: Super weapons and armors
ModMetaData.author: keventao
ModMetaData.description:
This mod adds LWOP-style items with optional Combat Extended support.
Items in this mod are inspired by LWOP Package (https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2012717312).
Current features: - Joywire: Permanent mood boost implant - HyperVitality Chip: Neural implant that reduces sleep need to 2 hours per day - Flying Tigers Super Rifle: High-capacity assault rifle - Flying Tigers Elite Helmet: Elite head protection (200 Sharp/Blunt armor) - Flying Tigers Elite Armor: Elite combat armor (200 Sharp/Blunt armor)
This mod works with or without Combat Extended. - With CE: CE-specific weapon and armor versions will be used (defNames without suffix) - Without CE: Vanilla versions will be used (defNames with _Vanilla suffix)
This mod is player-only: items will not spawn on NPCs or appear in trader inventories.
